judge_result.short_rationale: The answer includes unsupported cross-incident advice for skin exposure (remove clothing/shoes and wash skin) and an unsupported ingestion warning (do not induce vomiting) for an inhalation case. These are dangerous unsupported additions, so it hard-fails. It does include fresh air and urgent medical contact, but grounding is broken by the invented instructions.
